text: Top 5 South Korean Exchanges' Volume Falls for Five Straight Weeks, Below KRW 10 Trillion According to Digital Asset, the weekly trading volume of South Korea's top five fiat-market crypto exchanges (Upbit, Bithumb, Coinone, Korbit, and Gopax) has fallen for five consecutive weeks, dropping below the 10 trillion KRW mark. Data shows that the total trading volume for the week of July 3–10 was ~9.9676 trillion KRW, a 25.75% decrease from the previous week (approx. 13.4 trillion KRW) and a 43.5% decline from early June (17.7 trillion KRW). This marks the first time the weekly trading volume has fallen below 10 trillion KRW in about 2 years and 9 months, since late September 2023. — link

text: Just In: Hedera's largest lending protocol Bonzo loses $9M in oracle exploit Hedera-based lending protocol Bonzo Lend disclosed that it lost approximately $9.05 million in an oracle exploit. Bonzo said a flaw in Supra's signature verification allowed an attacker to manipulate SAUCE prices and borrow assets far exceeding posted collateral. The protocol has since been paused. Bonzo Labs and the Bonzo Finance Foundation coordinate on recovery and remediation efforts. — link

text: Highlight Clip Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin's Two Ticking Time Bombs Former Meta Engineer: Quantum Computing and Miners Are Bitcoin's Two Ticking Time Bombs A former Meta engineer says Bitcoin faces two ticking time bombs that have yet to be defused: quantum computing and the future of miner incentives. Quantum advances could one day threaten Bitcoin wallet security, while the lack of a sustainable fee market raises questions about long-term network security as mining rewards decline. He also challenges Bitcoin's vision as a sovereign currency, arguing that governments are unlikely to tolerate a monetary system beyond their control. — link

text: Life update: I'm officially joining as Head of Marketing. As someone who has spent the last 6 years in crypto across many different roles - a trader who made it and round-tripped it all, a builder who failed multiple times but kept going, and a terrible trencher who always top-blasted - I know how exhausting it is to deal with my trading issues alone, without proper risk management, only to blow up my account over and over again. After talking with @zerosumvictim and the rest of the team, I realized we share the same vision. What they're building is exactly what I've been looking for to stop me from my gambling addiction and improve my trading skills I'll be sharing more details today. I'm also looking for early testers to try out the platform, and I'd really appreciate any feedback!

text: Sky Protocol's Annualized Gross Revenue Run Rate Hits Record $419M Sky Frontier Foundation said in its June 2026 financial and operational update that Sky Protocol's annualized gross revenue run rate reached a record $419.08 million, based on the last three Monthly Settlement Cycles. Cumulative yield accrued to sUSDS holders through the Sky Savings Rate has surpassed $250 million since inception, while Sky Reserves closed June at $82.5 million, up $33.7 million since March. Grove, one of Sky's Prime Agents, launched its GROVE governance token in June. Separately, a fixed-yield product for sUSDS introduced through Sky.Money and Pendle Finance reached $44.1 million in TVL during its first month. — link
